word: H4383 - מִכְשֹׁול - mikshôwl - mik-shole' - Caused to fall

sections.paragraph:
Original: מכשׁל מכשׁול

Transliteration: mikshôl mikshôl

Phonetic: mik-shole'

BDB Definition:

  1. a stumbling, means or occasion of stumbling, stumbling block
    1. stumbling, fall
    2. means or occasion of stumbling, stumbling block

Origin: from H3782

TWOT entry: 1050c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
